title: Advanced Micro Devices Inc. (AMD) Intrinsic Value — Gemini 3.1 DCF Analysis
description: An independent discounted cash flow (DCF) intrinsic value analysis of Advanced Micro Devices Inc. (AMD) compiled entirely by Gemini 3.1.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: 15.0% - Aggressive growth driven by market share gains in server CPUs and rapid expansion of the MI300 AI accelerator franchise.
assumptions.terminalGrowthRate: 3.0% - Reflects long-term growth potential in high-performance computing and AI infrastructure.
assumptions.discountRate: 10.5% - A higher discount rate reflecting high Beta (2.02) and intense competition against a dominant market leader (Nvidia).
